title: It’s never too late to quit smoking - Canada.ca
content:
## It’s never too late…
Text on screen: It’s never too late
Close up of  an older man sanding wood.
Text on screen: To learn a new skill
An older  woman using a dumbbell.
Text on screen: To get active
Close up of  hands breaking a cigarette in half.
Text on screen: To quit smoking
Text on screen: Quitting is possible.
Text on screen: Getting support improves your chances of quitting.
Text on screen: Find tools and resources at Canada.ca/quit-smoking
Image on  screen: The Canadian Government logo with  accompanying jingle
